commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ad5499076544bbdc3b22a1f8f04a78f5272fc1c1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Control UI generated-image preview/action handling, authenticated thumbnail/full media routes, managed-image transcript replacement, thumbnail-size config schema, Codex timeout changes, tests, and changelog updates.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers at source level: the PR head clears media text before replacement, scans older transcript entries, widens Codex timeouts against the current contract, and inserts a stale release section. The generated-image action feature itself is not a current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor current-head proof plus maintainer review of broad UI/gateway/Codex behavior; automation should not repair while the external proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: feat(ui): add generated image actions
target.body:
## Summary

Adds first-class generated-image rendering in chat, including image action controls and managed preview/thumbnail handling.

- Adds hover actions for generated/managed images: open, download, and copy
- Routes managed generated images through authenticated blob previews so browser image actions work reliably
- Renders generated image frames with the same rounded clipping as other chat media
- Pre-scales known generated-image dimensions so the frame matches the visible thumbnail/image size
- Reserves pending preview space while managed image blobs load, preventing chat scroll/window jumps
- Serves timeline images from configurable thumbnail routes while keeping open/download/copy on the full image
- Adds `gateway.controlUi.imageThumbnailMaxSide` for local/managed Control UI thumbnails
- Extends the Codex dynamic-tool timeout path and normalizes raw final `MEDIA:` replies before managed media append

## Why

Generated images were being displayed without the full media affordances we expect in chat. The implementation also needed stable thumbnail/frame geometry so the new actions attach to the visible image, rounded corners clip the actual image, and the chat viewport does not jump while a managed preview is still loading.

The follow-up fixes make the preview/full-image split explicit: right-click View Image uses the thumbnail preview, while click/Open/Download/Copy use the original full-size image.

## Testing

- `corepack pnpm test ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/gateway/control-ui.http.test.ts src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm config:schema:check`
- Live local smoke: generated fresh 512x512 image with `gateway.controlUi.imageThumbnailMaxSide=64`; verified right-click uses thumbnail and Open/Download use full image

## Branch Notes

This branch is based directly on latest `upstream/main` and intentionally does not include PR #75727 gateway changes.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Generated/managed chat images render through Gateway media routes with stable preview sizing, thumbnail previews, and full-size Open/Download targets. Current head tested: `8c83ceb8a2d6efe0dab68a95046e79a732af1e2d`.

Real environment tested: Local Linux checkout in the PR worktree after merging latest upstream main. Earlier proof on this PR used an isolated local OpenClaw gateway with synthetic PNG fixtures and a Chromium harness importing the actual grouped chat renderer; current-head revalidation used the affected UI, gateway, plugin-contract, architecture, lint/type lanes.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
git diff --check
CI=true PATH="/tmp/openclaw-pr77017-proof-bin:$PATH" corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-ui.config.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts --reporter=dot
CI=true PATH="/tmp/openclaw-pr77017-proof-bin:$PATH" corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-server.config.ts src/gateway/server.node-invoke-approval-bypass.test.ts --reporter=dot
CI=true PATH="/tmp/openclaw-pr77017-proof-bin:$PATH" corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/deprecated-internal-config-api.test.ts --reporter=dot
CI=true PATH="/tmp/openclaw-pr77017-proof-bin:$PATH" corepack pnpm check:architecture
```

Evidence after fix: `git diff --check` passed. UI chat controller test passed: 56 tests. Gateway node approval bypass test passed: 5 tests. Plugin SDK/deprecated API contract tests passed: 18 tests. Architecture check passed: import cycles 0, Madge cycles 0, deprecated API guard passed, deprecated JSDoc guard passed. Earlier gateway/browser proof verified the full managed image route returned 512x512 PNG, thumbnail route returned 64x64 PNG, and the real chat renderer fetched `/thumbnail` with `x-openclaw-requester-session-key: agent:main:main` while Open/Download targeted the full route.

Observed result after fix: The branch is merged with latest upstream main, the stale-main conflict is resolved by taking upstream's newer plugin install-scan implementation, and the affected local verification is green on the current PR head.

What was not tested: I did not rerun the full hosted GitHub matrix locally; GitHub CI is responsible for the complete shard set.
target.author: ittiz

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
